title: Help me create a new quote for a client in Workroo…

messages.content:
Hello! I'm **MAX**, your Empire AI Assistant.

_Tip: Ctrl+V to paste images · Shift+Enter for newlines_
Help me create a new quote for a client in WorkroomForge. tim Marin , blue denim, two extra 20x20" pillows. 1 bolster 36"

I'll analyze that sofa image and build a quote for Tim Marin right now!

**Image Analysis:** I can see a classic roll-arm sofa with tight back cushions, loose seat cushions, and a clean silhouette — great candidate for a full reupholstery or slipcover in blue denim.

Let me open the QuoteBuilder with everything pre-filled:

```tool
{"tool": "open_quote_builder", "customer_name": "Tim Marin", "customer_email": "", "customer_phone": "", "customer_address": "", "project_name": "Sofa Reupholstery + Pillows — Blue Denim", "rooms": [{"name": "Upholstery Project", "windows": [], "upholstery": [{"name": "Roll-Arm Sofa — Full Reupholstery", "type": "sofa", "fabric": "Blue Denim", "yardage": 18, "laborHours": 12, "notes": "Full reupholstery in blue denim. Classic roll-arm silhouette with tight back and loose seat cushions."}, {"name": "Throw Pillow 20x20\" (x2)", "type": "pillow", "fabric": "Blue Denim", "yardage": 1.5, "laborHours": 1, "notes": "Two 20x20 inch accent pillows in matching blue denim. Knife edge or self-welt finish."}, {"name": "Bolster Pillow 36\"", "type": "bolster", "fabric": "Blue Denim", "yardage": 1, "laborHours": 0.75, "notes": "One 36-inch bolster pillow in blue denim. Coordinating end caps."}]}], "max_analysis": "This classic roll-arm sofa is a beautiful reupholstery candidate. The tight back and loose cushion construction pairs excellently with blue denim — a durable, casual-chic fabric that will give this piece a relaxed coastal or modern farmhouse feel. I recommend a medium-weight 12oz denim for structure, with self-welt detailing on the cushions to keep the look clean and intentional. The matching 20x20 pillows and 36-inch bolster will tie the set together perfectly."}
```

upholstery.name: Roll-Arm Sofa — Full Reupholstery
upholstery.notes: Full reupholstery in blue denim. Classic roll-arm silhouette with tight back and loose seat cushions.

upholstery.name: Throw Pillow 20x20" (x2)
upholstery.notes: Two 20x20 inch accent pillows in matching blue denim. Knife edge or self-welt finish.

upholstery.name: Bolster Pillow 36"
upholstery.notes: One 36-inch bolster pillow in blue denim. Coordinating end caps.

result.max_analysis: This classic roll-arm sofa is a beautiful reupholstery candidate. The tight back and loose cushion construction pairs excellently with blue denim — a durable, casual-chic fabric that will give this piece a relaxed coastal or modern farmhouse feel. I recommend a medium-weight 12oz denim for structure, with self-welt detailing on the cushions to keep the look clean and intentional. The matching 20x20 pillows and 36-inch bolster will tie the set together perfectly.
